video.title: Il Lombardia 2021 Highlights | Who Will Win The Final Monument Of The Road Cycling Season?

all_candidates.title: Il Lombardia 2021 Highlights | Who Will Win The Final Monument Of The Road Cycling Season?
POGAČAR ON TOP OF THE WORLD 🌍 OTD in 2021 Tadej Pogačar won his first Il Lombardia title 🔥
The start of an autumn dynasty 🍂 Tadej Pogacar won the first of four consecutive Lombardia’s in 2021
